#+title: Fixture: signature/keyword lint diagnostics (Step 9.2.b.0)
#+author: ELOT test suite

# Exercises the existing elot-lint checkers that 9.2.b.0 reframes
# as its source of truth:
#
# - elot/omn-keyword-appropriateness (keyword-kind ERRORs)
# - elot/axiom-value-curies         (undeclared-CURIE WARNINGs +
#                                    suggested-fix message)
#
# Rows of interest:
#
# - ex:Apple has  Domain :: ex:Fruit
#   Class section, but Domain is OP/DP-only -> keyword-appropriateness
#   ERROR.
#
# - ex:hasOwner (data property) has  SubPropertyChain :: ex:foo o ex:bar
#   Data-property section, but SubPropertyChain is OP-only ->
#   keyword-appropriateness ERROR.
#
# - ex:Pear has  SubClassOf :: ex:wolf
#   ex:wolf is undeclared -> axiom-value-curies WARNING with the
#   actionable-fix wording.
#
# - ex:ageInYears (data property) has  Range :: xsd:string
#   xsd:string is a built-in datatype -> clean.
#
# - ex:ageInYears has  Range :: ex:cat
#   ex:cat is declared so axiom-value-curies stays clean, but the
#   keyword-range checker (9.2.b.0.iv) flags it: a Class given where
#   a Datatype is expected.
#
# - ex:Pear has  SubClassOf :: ex:isAfraidOf
#   ex:isAfraidOf is declared as ObjectProperty -> 9.2.b.0.iv
#   keyword-range WARNING (Class expected, ObjectProperty given).

* my-ont
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: my-ont
:ELOT-context-type: ontology
:ELOT-context-localname: my-ont
:ELOT-default-prefix: ex
:header-args:omn: :tangle ./my-ont.omn :noweb yes
:END:

** Prefixes
:PROPERTIES:
:prefixdefs: yes
:END:

#+name: prefix-table
| prefix | uri                                         |
|--------+---------------------------------------------|
| owl:   | http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#              |
| rdf:   | http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns# |
| rdfs:  | http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#       |
| xsd:   | http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#           |
| ex:    | http://example.org/                         |
| exo:   | http://example.org/ont/                     |

** my-ont ontology (exo:my-ont exo:my-ont/0.0)
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: my-ont-ontology-declaration
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:

 - rdfs:comment :: Fixture for Step 9.2.b.0 lint diagnostics.

** Datatypes
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: my-ont-datatypes
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:

** Classes
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: my-ont-class-hierarchy
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:
*** Fruit (ex:Fruit)
 - rdfs:label :: Fruit
*** Apple (ex:Apple)
 - Domain :: ex:Fruit
*** Pear (ex:Pear)
 - SubClassOf :: ex:wolf
 - SubClassOf :: ex:isAfraidOf
*** Cat (ex:cat)
 - rdfs:label :: Cat

** Object properties
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: my-ont-object-property-hierarchy
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:
*** isAfraidOf (ex:isAfraidOf)
 - rdfs:label :: isAfraidOf

** Data properties
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: my-ont-data-property-hierarchy
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:
*** hasOwner (ex:hasOwner)
 - SubPropertyChain :: ex:foo o ex:bar
*** ageInYears (ex:ageInYears)
 - Range :: xsd:string
 - Range :: ex:cat

** Annotation properties
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: my-ont-annotation-property-hierarchy
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:

** Individuals
:PROPERTIES:
:ID: my-ont-individuals
:resourcedefs: yes
:END:
